rows.description: I certify that the Accounts of the College are Abstracts & Balance Sheet contain a full & true
rows.notes: Visual override for description ('are' from gpt-5-mini is correct, gemini-flash had 'and') and row_type ('header' is more suitable for this certification text than 'entry'). Side set to 'center' as per gemini-flash's observation for this multi-line block.
